title: nepeta nervosa var. lutea
intro: Nepeta nervosa var. lutea, also known as Yellow Catmint, is a plant species in the mint family, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Yellow Catmint include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and respiratory problems. The plant is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
